assertions.assertion: Response warns that the issuer URI (iss claim) must remain the same after migration
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Step 2.5 explicitly states 'The issuer URI (iss claim) must remain identical after migration'

assertions.assertion: Response explains that changing the issuer breaks existing tokens and/or client trust relationships
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Step 2.5 states 'If it changes, all existing tokens become invalid and client trust relationships break'

assertions.assertion: Response recommends setting options.IssuerUri explicitly in the Duende IdentityServer configuration
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Step 2.5 shows 'options.IssuerUri = "https://identity.example.com"' and recommends setting it explicitly

assertions.assertion: Response suggests checking the current /.well-known/openid-configuration discovery document to find the existing issuer value
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Step 2.5 states 'check the /.well-known/openid-configuration of your old instance, note the issuer value'
